description: Very angry customer, missing package, all slots needed
customer_opening: I AM FURIOUS. Order ORD-93810 was due 2024-02-01 and nothing! Your service is a JOKE.

customer_replies.greet: Hi. My order ORD-93810 hasn't arrived and I'm very upset.
customer_replies.ask_info: Order ID is ORD-93810, due 2024-02-01, address 666 Hickory Blvd Minneapolis MN 55401, carrier USPS.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes that's correct.
customer_replies.apologize: Thanks for apologizing. I just need to know where my package is.
customer_replies.resolve: You resolved it without knowing my details? That makes no sense.
customer_replies.escalate: Fine, I'll wait for the specialist. Please give them my order ID ORD-93810.
customer_replies.provide_info: Okay so it's in transit? When will it arrive exactly?
customer_replies.tool_query: What did the tracking show? Is it delayed or lost?

description: Frustrated customer charged incorrectly, expects refund
customer_opening: I was charged $120 instead of $60 for my subscription. This is unacceptable.

customer_replies.greet: Hi yes, I have a billing problem on my account.
customer_replies.ask_info: Account is ACC-4421, charged $120 on 2024-01-15, should have been $60.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, ACC-4421, $120 charged, should be $60, on January 15th. That's correct.
customer_replies.apologize: Thank you. I just want this fixed quickly.
customer_replies.resolve: Great, so the $60 refund will be processed? Thank you.
customer_replies.escalate: Okay, I'll wait to hear from the billing team.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, so there was a system error?
customer_replies.tool_query: What does the billing system show for my account?

description: Fraud case - MUST escalate, never resolve directly
customer_opening: Someone made unauthorized charges on my account! I did not authorize these transactions!

customer_replies.greet: Hi yes, there are fraudulent charges on my account, I need help immediately.
customer_replies.ask_info: My account is ACC-7890, transactions TXN-001 and TXN-002 on 2024-01-20, total $340.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes correct, those are the fraudulent transactions.
customer_replies.apologize: Thank you for taking this seriously.
customer_replies.resolve: Wait, you can't just resolve this yourself, this is fraud! I need security involved.
customer_replies.escalate: Yes please escalate immediately. I need the fraud team on this.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, what happens next with the investigation?
customer_replies.tool_query: What does the system show about these transactions?

description: Locked account, standard recovery flow
customer_opening: I can't log into my account. I've tried resetting my password three times and it still doesn't work.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I need help accessing my account, it seems locked.
customer_replies.ask_info: My email is john@example.com, account ACC-1234, last logged in about a week ago on January 10th.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, john@example.com, ACC-1234, last login January 10th. Correct.
customer_replies.apologize: Thanks, I've been locked out for two days which is frustrating.
customer_replies.resolve: Great, I'll try the reset link now. Thank you!
customer_replies.escalate: Okay, I'll wait for the account specialist.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, so my account was flagged for security?
customer_replies.tool_query: What does the system show about my account status?

description: Package arrived visibly damaged, customer wants replacement
customer_opening: My package arrived completely smashed. The box is crushed and the item inside is broken. I'm really angry.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I received a damaged package and I want a replacement immediately.
customer_replies.ask_info: Order ORD-55234, delivered by FedEx on 2024-01-18, the laptop screen is cracked.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, ORD-55234, FedEx, January 18th, cracked laptop screen. All correct.
customer_replies.apologize: I appreciate the apology. I just need this resolved fast.
customer_replies.resolve: Okay, so a replacement will be sent within 3-5 days? That works for me.
customer_replies.escalate: Fine, the specialist can reach me at the same number on my account.
customer_replies.provide_info: Okay, so I need to file a claim with FedEx too?
customer_replies.tool_query: What's the status in your system for this order?

description: App not working, standard technical troubleshooting
customer_opening: Your mobile app keeps crashing every time I try to open it. I've tried reinstalling but same issue.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I need technical help with your mobile app.
customer_replies.ask_info: iPhone 13, iOS 17.2, app version 4.1.2, it crashes with error code APP-500.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Correct, iPhone 13, iOS 17.2, app 4.1.2, error APP-500.
customer_replies.apologize: Okay, thanks for acknowledging the issue.
customer_replies.resolve: Alright, I'll try clearing the app cache and updating. Thank you!
customer_replies.escalate: Fine, the technical team can contact me at the email on my account.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, so it's a known bug in version 4.1.2?
customer_replies.tool_query: What's the known issue with error APP-500?

description: Customer wants refund for a product they returned 2 weeks ago
customer_opening: I returned a product two weeks ago and still haven't received my refund. This is taking way too long.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I'm following up on a missing refund for a returned item.
customer_replies.ask_info: Order ORD-11290, returned on 2024-01-05 via UPS tracking 1Z999, refund should be $89.99.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes correct, ORD-11290, returned January 5th, UPS 1Z999, $89.99 refund.
customer_replies.apologize: Thank you. I just want to know when I'll actually see the money.
customer_replies.resolve: Great, so I should see the refund in 2-3 business days? Thank you.
customer_replies.escalate: Okay, have the billing team email me at the address on file.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, so there was a processing delay on your end?
customer_replies.tool_query: What does the refund system show for this order?

description: Product stopped working after 2 weeks, customer wants exchange
customer_opening: The product I bought stopped working after only 2 weeks! This is ridiculous, I want an exchange immediately.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I need to report a defective product I recently purchased.
customer_replies.ask_info: Product ID PROD-887, order ORD-44112, purchased 2024-01-02, the battery won't hold charge at all.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, PROD-887, order ORD-44112, January 2nd, battery issue. Correct.
customer_replies.apologize: Thank you. I expected better quality for the price I paid.
customer_replies.resolve: Alright, so an exchange will be shipped within 5 days? That's acceptable.
customer_replies.escalate: Okay, have the product team call me on my registered number.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, so this is a known defect in that batch?
customer_replies.tool_query: Is there a known issue with this product model?

description: Customer asking about product compatibility and features
customer_opening: I want to know if your wireless headphones are compatible with both iPhone and Android devices.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I have some questions about a product before I buy it.
customer_replies.ask_info: The Wireless Pro Headphones model WH-300, I'll use it with both iPhone 14 and Samsung Galaxy S23.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, WH-300, iPhone 14 and Samsung Galaxy S23. That's right.
customer_replies.apologize: No worries, I just want to make sure before purchasing.
customer_replies.resolve: That's great, so it works with both. I'll go ahead and order. Thanks!
customer_replies.escalate: Okay, can the product specialist email me the compatibility details?
customer_replies.provide_info: Perfect, and does it support multi-device pairing simultaneously?
customer_replies.tool_query: What are the full compatibility specs for WH-300?

description: Customer frustrated about waiting 5 days for support response
customer_opening: I submitted a support ticket 5 days ago and nobody has responded. This is terrible service.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I'm frustrated because my support ticket has been ignored for 5 days.
customer_replies.ask_info: Ticket ID TKT-3301, submitted 2024-01-12, about a billing error on my account.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, TKT-3301, January 12th, billing error. Correct.
customer_replies.apologize: Thank you. Five days is just too long to wait.
customer_replies.resolve: Okay, so my original ticket will be addressed within 24 hours? I'll hold you to that.
customer_replies.escalate: Fine, have a supervisor call me back today please.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, there was a high volume of tickets this week?
customer_replies.tool_query: What's the status of ticket TKT-3301 in your system?

description: Customer wants to upgrade subscription plan
customer_opening: I'd like to upgrade my current basic plan to the premium subscription.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I want to change my subscription plan.
customer_replies.ask_info: My account is ACC-9977, currently on the Basic plan, want to upgrade to Premium Annual.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, ACC-9977, Basic to Premium Annual. That's correct.
customer_replies.apologize: No problem, I understand these things take a moment.
customer_replies.resolve: Great, so the upgrade is done and I'll be billed the annual rate? Perfect, thanks!
customer_replies.escalate: Okay, have the accounts team email me the upgrade confirmation.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, so the price difference will be prorated?
customer_replies.tool_query: What are the current Premium Annual pricing details?

description: Customer charged 3 times for same order, extremely angry
customer_opening: YOU CHARGED ME THREE TIMES FOR THE SAME ORDER. THREE TIMES! I want all my money back NOW.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, there is a serious problem with my billing and I am extremely upset.
customer_replies.ask_info: Account ACC-5531, order ORD-77712, charged 3 times at $45 each, so $90 overcharged.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, ACC-5531, ORD-77712, 3 charges, $90 overcharge. Correct.
customer_replies.apologize: An apology isn't enough, I need this fixed today.
customer_replies.resolve: Okay the $90 refund will be processed today? I'll be watching my account.
customer_replies.escalate: Yes get me a supervisor immediately.
customer_replies.provide_info: So it was a system glitch? That's unacceptable.
customer_replies.tool_query: Look up my account and tell me what you see.

description: Package marked delivered but not received, calm customer
customer_opening: My tracking shows the package was delivered yesterday but I haven't received anything.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I have a delivery issue I'd like help with.
customer_replies.ask_info: Order ORD-20023, tracking TRK-88821, to 42 Oak Street Boston MA 02101, shows delivered 2024-01-19.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, ORD-20023, TRK-88821, 42 Oak Street Boston, January 19th. Correct.
customer_replies.apologize: Thank you, I appreciate the help.
customer_replies.resolve: Great, so you'll investigate and contact the carrier? I'll check with my neighbors too.
customer_replies.escalate: Sure, have the delivery team reach out to me.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, so it may have been left with a neighbor?

description: Website login not working, customer cannot access services
customer_opening: Your website won't let me log in. I keep getting an error page and I need to access my account urgently.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I'm having trouble logging into the website.
customer_replies.ask_info: Using Chrome 120, getting error 403, email is sarah@email.com, I've tried clearing cache and different browsers.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, Chrome 120, error 403, sarah@email.com, already tried cache clear. Correct.
customer_replies.apologize: Thank you. I just need access today for an urgent payment.
customer_replies.resolve: Okay so my account should be accessible now? Let me try... yes it works! Thank you.
customer_replies.escalate: Okay, have the technical team email me the fix.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, there's ongoing maintenance on the login service?
customer_replies.tool_query: What's the current system status for the login service?

description: Identity theft reported, very distressed customer, MUST escalate
customer_opening: Someone has stolen my identity and opened accounts in my name! I am completely devastated.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, this is extremely urgent. I'm a victim of identity theft.
customer_replies.ask_info: My account ACC-3312, discovered on 2024-01-17, three fraudulent accounts opened, police report #PR-2024-0117.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, ACC-3312, three fraudulent accounts, discovered January 17th, police report PR-2024-0117.
customer_replies.apologize: Thank you. I'm really distressed and need immediate help.
customer_replies.resolve: You cannot resolve identity theft yourself! I need your security and legal team NOW.
customer_replies.escalate: Yes please, I need the fraud specialist and security team immediately.
customer_replies.provide_info: What steps do I need to take to protect my remaining accounts?
customer_replies.tool_query: What fraud alerts are on my account currently?

description: Customer wants refund for unused subscription, polite request
customer_opening: I'd like to request a refund for my annual subscription. I barely used it and it renewed last week.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I want to request a refund for a subscription renewal.
customer_replies.ask_info: Account ACC-6612, Premium Annual subscription, renewed 2024-01-14, I barely used any features.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, ACC-6612, Premium Annual, renewed January 14th, low usage. Correct.
customer_replies.apologize: Thank you, I appreciate you looking into this.
customer_replies.resolve: Great, so the prorated refund will be processed in 5-7 days? That sounds fair.
customer_replies.escalate: Okay, have the billing team reach out with options.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, what's the refund policy for annual subscriptions within 30 days?
customer_replies.tool_query: What is the usage history for my account?

description: High-value item destroyed in shipping, customer threatening legal action
customer_opening: My $800 camera lens arrived completely shattered. I am considering legal action if this isn't resolved TODAY.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I have an extremely serious complaint about a high-value damaged shipment.
customer_replies.ask_info: Order ORD-99001, $800 camera lens, completely shattered, shipped via DHL.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, ORD-99001, $800 lens, shattered by DHL. That's correct.
customer_replies.apologize: An apology doesn't fix a shattered $800 lens. What are you going to DO?
customer_replies.resolve: You're going to send a replacement or issue a full refund immediately? Okay, which one?
customer_replies.escalate: Yes get me your manager NOW.
customer_replies.provide_info: So you'll file a claim with DHL? What does that mean for my replacement timeline?
customer_replies.tool_query: What does the shipping insurance cover for this order?

description: Account hacked, customer locked out by attacker
customer_opening: My account has been hacked! Someone changed my email and password and now I can't get in. I'm furious!

customer_replies.greet: Hi, my account was compromised and I've been locked out by the hacker.
customer_replies.ask_info: Original email mike@domain.com, account ACC-8823, I last changed my password January 1st, I see logins from an unknown IP.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, mike@domain.com, ACC-8823, last password change Jan 1st, unknown IP logins. Correct.
customer_replies.apologize: Thank you for understanding. I need my account back urgently.
customer_replies.resolve: Okay so the account recovery process is started? How long will it take?
customer_replies.escalate: Yes please involve the security team immediately.
customer_replies.provide_info: What steps should I take to secure my other accounts too?
customer_replies.tool_query: What unusual activity does the system show on my account?

description: Minor product defect, customer wants warranty repair
customer_opening: I noticed a small defect on my recently purchased item. The screen has a dead pixel. Can I get a warranty repair?

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I'd like to arrange a warranty repair for a product I bought.
customer_replies.ask_info: Product WM-200 monitor, order ORD-33102, bought 2023-12-15, single dead pixel in the center.
customer_replies.confirm_details: Yes, WM-200, December 15th 2023, dead pixel in center. Correct.
customer_replies.apologize: No problem, I understand quality control isn't always perfect.
customer_replies.resolve: Great, so I'll receive the repair instructions by email? Thank you!
customer_replies.escalate: Sure, have the warranty department contact me.
customer_replies.provide_info: I see, so the warranty covers dead pixels? Good to know.
customer_replies.tool_query: What's the warranty status for this product?

description: Sentiment escalation mid-conversation: starts frustrated, becomes very_angry
customer_opening: My order hasn't arrived and it's 3 days late. I'm getting really frustrated with the delays.

customer_replies.greet: Hi, I need help with a late delivery.
customer_replies.ask_info: Order ORD-67123, should have arrived January 15th, to 99 Pine Ave Chicago IL 60601, shipped via UPS. AND NOW I'M EVEN MORE ANGRY BECAUSE I JUST GOT A NEW EMAIL SAYING IT'S DELAYED AGAIN.
customer_replies.confirm_details: YES IT'S CORRECT. When will it actually arrive?!
customer_replies.apologize: Fine but how many times are you going to apologize? I need ACTION not apologies.
customer_replies.resolve: Resolving this without proper investigation? This keeps happening and I am DONE with your service.
customer_replies.escalate: FINALLY. Someone who will actually DO something. Yes escalate this.
customer_replies.provide_info: What do you mean it's in transit? It was supposed to be here 3 days ago!
customer_replies.tool_query: Just check your system and tell me WHERE my package is RIGHT NOW.
